url.scheme.message: Target only supports HTTP(S) request URLs.

headers.unsafeWhen: Duplicate header names may be coalesced by generated JavaScript header structures.

body.multipart.message: undici supports multipart bodies through FormData.

auth.basic.message: undici can send basic auth through the Authorization header.

cookies.inline.message: undici can send explicit Cookie headers.

cookies.jar.message: undici target does not load curl cookie jar files.

proxy.message: undici proxy support uses ProxyAgent or Socks5ProxyAgent dispatchers.

tls.verify.message: undici Agent can represent TLS verification settings.

tls.ca.message: undici Agent and ProxyAgent requestTls options can represent request TLS CA settings.

tls.client-cert.message: undici Agent and ProxyAgent requestTls options can represent TLS client certificate settings.

network.message: undici requires custom connector wiring to preserve curl network binding or connection routing.

dns.message: undici requires custom connector wiring to preserve curl DNS resolver overrides.

redirects.message: undici supports redirect behavior through request options.

http.version.2.message: undici does not expose curl-style HTTP/2 selection.

http.version.3.message: undici does not expose HTTP/3 selection.

debug.message: undici output cannot reproduce curl verbose or trace wire dumps.

external-ref.message: Generated code must provide runtime handling for external references.
external-ref.requiredRuntime: Node.js filesystem access to referenced inputs.
